currently_doing: Manual history-buffer rescue is no longer a product path after the offset-push fix failed, so the work has pivoted to an Akida-native temporal design search.
phase_note: The dashboard now tracks the temporal-conv/TENN-like pivot instead of further manual-buffer rescue.
recent_pivots: The manual history-buffer path is effectively dead for product use after the offset-push rescue failed
The project has pivoted from manual buffer repair to an Akida-native temporal path
DepthwiseBufferTempConv is the clearest Akida-native clue found so far
Next work should center on a temporal-conv or TENN-like bridge, not more manual-buffer rescue
cleanup_backlog: Consolidate obsolete or superseded experiment claims in pitch materials after the next engineering result
Archive stale coordination snapshots and keep only the current truth in coordination_status.json
Mark which artifact results are toy-setup only versus toolchain-valid
Add direct links from the dashboard to the key reports and diagnostics
Prune or label weaker branches so stakeholders can distinguish active path from dead ends

major_milestones.name: Workspace and measurement harness
major_milestones.summary: Prototype workspace, baseline scripts, artifacts, and dashboard are in place.

major_milestones.name: Sparse surrogate discovery
major_milestones.summary: Threshold-gated surrogate exceeded target in software with 7.53x proxy gain and 0.266% relative MSE.

major_milestones.name: Alternative mechanism comparison
major_milestones.summary: Top-k, spike-proxy, Lava feasibility, Meta-TF feasibility, prior-art scan, and moat diagnostics are done.

major_milestones.name: Akida-friendly surrogate design
major_milestones.summary: The manual history-buffer branch produced useful evidence but is no longer the product direction.

major_milestones.name: Quantization and conversion validation
major_milestones.summary: Validation focus has shifted to an Akida-native temporal-conv/TENN-like bridge, with DepthwiseBufferTempConv as the main clue.

major_milestones.name: Hardware purchase readiness decision
major_milestones.summary: Decide on chip purchase only after the new Akida-native temporal path survives the real toolchain path and context behavior is acceptable.

pending_tasks: Translate the DepthwiseBufferTempConv clue into a concrete Akida-native temporal-conv surrogate design
Prototype a TENN-like temporal bridge instead of further manual history-buffer rescue
Retest cnn2snn compatibility and Akida conversion on the new temporal path
Measure token-position error curves on the temporal-conv pivot
Keep softmax and LayerNorm out of the hardware-valid bridge
Reframe the moat around quantization/conversion survival plus native temporal context handling

completed_subagent_wave.name: akida-quantization-bridge
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Signed-int8 Dense -> ReLU6 -> Dense -> ReLU6 -> Dense quantized and converted successfully; uint8 failed on input sign incompatibility.

completed_subagent_wave.name: context-decay-curve
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Current threshold surrogate error grows strongly with context on a GPT-2-style causal proxy; long-context moat not yet proven.

completed_subagent_wave.name: threshold-sweep-1
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Confirmed threshold 0.20 as a strong reproducible operating point.

completed_subagent_wave.name: topk-gating
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Top-k improved fidelity but missed the 5x efficiency target at fixed k=2.
